name: ai-adoption
description: Two skills for analyzing your Claude history. token-doctor diagnoses where your Claude Code + Cowork spend goes (length distribution, marathon share, cache rebuilds, per-project health) and writes a doctor-style terminal report, optionally fanning out parallel Haiku subagents over your top sessions for habit-level recommendations. task-profile mines those same sessions into a structured task profile: what you do with AI, how often, how successfully, where friction lives; it emits a shareable CSV, an interactive HTML explorer, AI-first coaching cards, and up to five task-centric skill proposals. (session-search moved to the session-tools plugin.)
